text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Egg consumption is associated with risk of all-cause mortality and cardiovascular disease mortality","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Association of Egg Consumption with Risk of All-Cause and Cardiovascular Disease Mortality: A Systematic Review and Dose–Response Meta-Analysis of Observational Studies","entailment":"The title explicitly states an association between egg consumption and the risk of both all‑cause and cardiovascular disease mortality, supporting the claim.","population":"observational studies","intervention":"egg consumption","comparator":"","outcome":"all-cause mortality and cardiovascular disease mortality","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"Egg consumption is linked to risk of coronary heart disease and stroke","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Egg consumption and risk of coronary heart disease and stroke: Dose-response meta-analysis of prospective cohort studies","entailment":"The title indicates a dose‑response meta‑analysis examining how egg consumption relates to the risk of coronary heart disease and stroke, confirming the claim.","population":"prospective cohort studies","intervention":"egg consumption","comparator":"","outcome":"coronary heart disease and stroke","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"Egg consumption is associated with stroke risk","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Egg Consumption and Stroke Risk: A Systematic Review and Dose-Response Meta-Analysis of Prospective Studies","entailment":"The title declares a systematic review and meta‑analysis that assesses the association between egg consumption and stroke risk, supporting the claim.","population":"prospective studies","intervention":"egg consumption","comparator":"","outcome":"stroke","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"}]}
